title: Magick Mastery
summary: Magick uses branching thresholds to separate ritual control from raw channeling, so canonical magical progression can later drive more guided unlock presentation.

thresholds.title: Arcane Awareness
thresholds.description: Choose how you interact with the arcane.

thresholds.title: Ether Practice
thresholds.description: Your approach to magic becomes more stable.

thresholds.title: Archmage Path
thresholds.description: Late thresholds support committed magical specialization.

nodes.title: Ritual Geometry
nodes.description: Favors careful control, setup, and magical stability.

nodes.title: Wild Channeling
nodes.description: Favors raw throughput and forceful spell shaping.

nodes.title: Sigil Memory
nodes.description: Deepens ritual magic into layered preparation.

nodes.title: Surging Current
nodes.description: Deepens channeling into more forceful arcane commitment.
